phrases.intent_en: Do clubs here have cover charges?
phrases.text_local: Buradaki kulüplerde giriş ücreti var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Cover charges are standard practice, especially at the larger open-air venues in the district, but policies can vary by night and event.

likely_response.local: Evet, çoğu açık hava mekânında var.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, most open-air venues have them.

responses.english: Yes, most open-air venues have them.
responses.local: Evet, çoğu açık hava mekânında var.

phrases.cultural_note: Barlar Sokağı is a well-known strip but its exact entrance point within the Halikarnas Bölgesi is not a stable, fixed target with a single defined entrance. Staff will avoid giving precise street directions to avoid liability in a crowded, confusing district.

likely_response.translation_en: Walk along the coast road, it's on the marina side.

responses.english: Walk along the coast road, it's on the marina side.

phrases.intent_en: How do I get a bottle service table?
phrases.cultural_note: Bottle service is arranged in person through venue staff (bouncers or waiters), not at a central ticket booth. It implies a negotiation for a minimum spend.

likely_response.local: Güvenliğe veya garsona sorun, genellikle girişte rezervasyon yaptırabilirsiniz.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the security guard or the waiter, you can usually make a reservation at the entrance.

responses.english: Ask the security guard or the waiter, you can usually make a reservation at the entrance.
responses.local: Güvenliğe veya garsona sorun, genellikle girişte rezervasyon yaptırabilirsiniz.
